---
title: "Contact Information"
editor: visual
---

Elizabeth McDaniel, PhD\
elizabethmcd93 @ gmail.com

The best way to contact me is at the email address above, with spaces removed.

## Requests for Peer Review & Public Comments

**I no longer accept requests to review for peer-reviewed journals with closed review practices.** However, I do enjoy reviewing preprints and posting public comments. If you have a preprint that you think I might be interested in reviewing, please email me with the preprint link. My expertise spans microbiology, multi-omics approaches, and open source software.

I post comments publicly on bioRxiv and medRxiv preprints through [Hypothesis](https://web.hypothes.is/). You can see the public comments I've made below.


```{=html}
<!-- Hypothesis feed. Set data-hyp-user to your hypothes.is username (without the @hypothes.is). -->
<div id="hypothesis-feed" data-hyp-user="elizabethmcd" data-hyp-limit="20">
  <p class="hyp-status">Loading recent annotations…</p>
</div>

<style>
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-scroll { max-height: 460px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid rgba(128,128,128,0.25); border-radius: 10px; padding: 0 1rem; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-item { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(128,128,128,0.25); }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-details { width: 100%; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-summary { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.5rem; align-items: baseline; padding: 0.85rem 1.6rem 0.85rem 0; cursor: pointer; list-style: none; position: relative; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-summary::after { content: "›"; position: absolute; right: 0.2rem; top: 0.8rem; opacity: 0.6; transition: transform 0.15s ease; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-details[open] .hyp-summary::after { transform: rotate(90deg); }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-title { font-weight: 600; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-date { font-size: 0.85rem; opacity: 0.7; white-space: nowrap; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-body { padding: 0 0 1rem; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-quote { margin: 0.25rem 0 0.6rem; padding: 0.4rem 0.9rem; border-left: 3px solid rgba(128,128,128,0.5); font-style: italic; opacity: 0.85; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-text { margin: 0.4rem 0; white-space: pre-wrap; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-tags { margin-top: 0.5rem; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-tag { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem; margin: 0.15rem 0.3rem 0 0; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(128,128,128,0.18); }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-link { display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.6rem; font-size: 0.85rem; }
#hypothesis-feed .hyp-status { opacity: 0.7; }
</style>

<script>
(function () {
  var container = document.getElementById('hypothesis-feed');
  if (!container) return;
  var username = (container.getAttribute('data-hyp-user') || '').trim();
  var limit = container.getAttribute('data-hyp-limit') || 20;

  if (!username || username === 'REPLACE_WITH_HYPOTHESIS_USERNAME') {
    container.innerHTML = '<p class="hyp-status">Set your hypothes.is username in the page source to enable this feed.</p>';
    return;
  }

  var api = 'https://hypothes.is/api/search?limit=' + encodeURIComponent(limit) +
            '&sort=updated&order=desc&user=acct:' +
            encodeURIComponent(username) + '%40hypothes.is';

  function esc(s) { var d = document.createElement('div'); d.textContent = s == null ? '' : s; return d.innerHTML; }
  function fmtDate(iso) {
    try { return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString(undefined, { year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }); }
    catch (e) { return iso; }
  }
  function quoteOf(row) {
    var sel = (row.target && row.target[0] && row.target[0].selector) || [];
    for (var i = 0; i < sel.length; i++) { if (sel[i].type === 'TextQuoteSelector') return sel[i].exact; }
    return '';
  }

  fetch(api, { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } })
    .then(function (r) { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); })
    .then(function (data) {
      // Keep only annotations that carry a written comment (skip bare highlights).
      var rows = (data.rows || []).filter(function (r) { return r.text && r.text.trim(); });
      if (!rows.length) { container.innerHTML = '<p class="hyp-status">No public annotations yet.</p>'; return; }

      var html = '<div class="hyp-scroll"><ul class="hyp-list">';
      rows.forEach(function (row) {
        var link = (row.links && row.links.incontext) || row.uri;
        var title = (row.document && row.document.title && row.document.title[0]) || row.uri;
        var quote = quoteOf(row);
        html += '<li class="hyp-item"><details class="hyp-details">';
        html += '<summary class="hyp-summary">';
        html += '<span class="hyp-title">' + esc(title) + '</span>';
        html += '<span class="hyp-date">' + esc(fmtDate(row.updated)) + '</span>';
        html += '</summary>';
        html += '<div class="hyp-body">';
        if (quote) html += '<blockquote class="hyp-quote">' + esc(quote) + '</blockquote>';
        html += '<div class="hyp-text">' + esc(row.text) + '</div>';
        if (row.tags && row.tags.length) {
          html += '<div class="hyp-tags">';
          row.tags.forEach(function (tg) { html += '<span class="hyp-tag">' + esc(tg) + '</span>'; });
          html += '</div>';
        }
        html += '<a class="hyp-link" href="' + esc(link) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View annotation in context ↗</a>';
        html += '</div></details></li>';
      });
      html += '</ul></div>';
      container.innerHTML = html;
    })
    .catch(function (err) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p class="hyp-status">Could not load annotations right now.</p>';
      console.error('Hypothesis feed error:', err);
    });
})();
</script>
```
